title: Buy now, pay later
excerpt: Learn about buy now, pay later methods with Stripe. You can also use subscription schedules to set up [installment plans](https://docs.stripe.com/billing/subscriptions/subscription-schedules.md#installment-plans). Learn more about other options for [accepting payments in installments](https://docs.stripe.com/recurring-payments.md#installment-plans). Buy now, pay later methods let customers pay in installments over time. You’re paid immediately and in full and your customers pay nothing or a portion of the total at purchase time. Buy now, pay later methods are often used by: - Retailers selling high value goods and services like luxury items or travel fares that want to increase conversion.…
